[xule.ruleDebug] Processing: DQC.US.0213.10740 - 11:30:42.283888 - D:\DJT\Documents\GitHub\davidtauriello\dqc_us_rules\tests\input\testfiles\2024-roll-2025\WDSP_instance_2024_2025.xml

[xule.ruleDebug] D:\DJT\Documents\GitHub\davidtauriello\dqc_us_rules\tests\input\testfiles\2024-roll-2025\WDSP_instance_2024_2025.xml - D:\DJT\Documents\GitHub\davidtauriello\dqc_us_rules\tests\input\testfiles\2024-roll-2025\WDSP_instance_2024_2025.xml

[DQC.US.0213.10740] The item us-gaap:Liabilities in the balance sheet with a value of 5,324,089 does not include calculation children in the role 00000002 - Statement - Consolidated Balance Sheets. The concept us-gaap:Liabilities should contain calculation children if it is included in the balance sheet. If the calculation children are defined in another role then include them in the calculation role so that the balance sheet calculations are complete.
Rule Element Id:10740 Rule version: 29.0.2 - https://xbrl.fasb.org/us-gaap/2025/elts/us-gaap-2025.xsd 4389

[DQC.US.0213.10740] The item us-gaap:Liabilities in the balance sheet with a value of 2,886,837 does not include calculation children in the role 00000002 - Statement - Consolidated Balance Sheets. The concept us-gaap:Liabilities should contain calculation children if it is included in the balance sheet. If the calculation children are defined in another role then include them in the calculation role so that the balance sheet calculations are complete.
Rule Element Id:10740 Rule version: 29.0.2 - https://xbrl.fasb.org/us-gaap/2025/elts/us-gaap-2025.xsd 4389
